code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut idx = 0
mut out = ""
mut current = ""
mut in_token = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_token
        if idx % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(out)
            out = current
          else
            out = "#{out} #{current}"
          end
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        current = ""
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_token = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_token
  if idx % 2 == 0
    if string.is_empty(out)
      out = current
    else
      out = "#{out} #{current}"
    end
  end
end

println(out)
